tree_inscription_1.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'The soul of the witch
Digs deep into the swamp
Like the [color=gold]roots[/color] of these trees'

tree_inscription_2.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'What the [color=gold]water[/color] swallows
It does not destroy
It only keeps safe'

tree_inscription_3.text:
The tree inscription reads:
'The dead do not leave
They only [color=gold]forget[/color] the way
Back to what they loved'

Lena_Entry.text: Yes, I am Lena, the sister of Fendor. The swamp is my home now. I have no interest in returning to the city.

Lena_without_quest.text: ...I would stay away if I were you. I am much stronger than I look.

Lena_QuestUpdate.text: Of course he is, that is all that he does after our parents died. But I have to defend Fendor and the kingdom in my own way. And that means becoming a witch.

choices.text: I will tell him you are safe.

Lena_Fairwell.text:
Thank you. I hope he can understand that this is what I need to do.
 For your own good, stay away from the remaining trees. You are not nearly strong enough to handle them.

Fen_Entry.text: Greetings, Stranger! Are you lost in my bog?

Fen_QuestOffer_RedJelly.text: I am trying to make a sandwich, but I am missing the Red Jelly! If you could bring me 5 Red Jelly, I would be very grateful.

witch_sandwich_RedJelly_HandIn.text: Thank you so much for the Red Jelly! I can finally make my sandwich!

witch_QuestOffer_sandwich_spider.text: I am trying to make a sandwich, but I am missing the Spider's Liver! If you could bring me one, I would be very grateful.

witch_Quest_sandwich_spider_HandIn.text: I am pleased with this spider liver. Thank you.
